segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translation.text: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why did the plane turn back?
I used to travel by air a great deal when I was a boy.

translation.text: 我小时候经常乘飞机旅行。

segments.text: My parents used to live in South America, and I used to fly there from Europe in the holidays.

translation.text: 父母曾住在南美洲，假期里我常从欧洲乘飞机去那里。

segments.text: A flight attendant would take charge of me, and I never had an unpleasant experience.

translation.text: 一名空乘人员会照顾我，我从未有过不愉快的经历。

segments.text: I am used to traveling by air, and only on one occasion have I ever felt frightened.

translation.text: 我习惯乘飞机旅行，只有一次真正感到过害怕。

segments.text: After taking off, we were flying low over the city, and slowly gaining height, when the plane suddenly turned round and flew back to the airport.

translation.text: 起飞后，我们正低空飞越城市并缓缓爬升，飞机却突然调头飞回机场。

segments.text: While we were waiting to land, a flight attendant told us to keep calm and to get off the plane quietly as soon as it had touched down.

translation.text: 等候降落时，一名空乘告诉我们保持镇静，飞机一着陆就安静有序地下机。

segments.text: Everybody on board was worried, and we were curious to find out what had happened.

translation.text: 机上每个人都很担心，也都急于知道发生了什么。

segments.text: Later we learnt that there was a very important person on board.

translation.text: 后来我们得知，机上有一位非常重要的人物。

segments.text: The police had been told that a bomb had been planted on the plane.

translation.text: 警方接到消息，说飞机上被人安放了一枚炸弹。

segments.text: After we had landed, the plane was searched thoroughly.

translation.text: 降落后，飞机接受了彻底搜查。

segments.text: Fortunately, nothing was found and five hours later we were able to take off again.

translation.text: 什么也没发现；五小时后，我们终于再次起飞。
